message:
perf(widgets): replace linear contains() with binary_search() in filtered list operations

Switch two Vec::contains() calls on the sorted filtered_indices
vector to binary_search().is_ok()/is_err():

- multi_selected.retain(): O(n log n) instead of O(n²) when pruning
  selection state after filter changes
- hovered state validation: O(log n) instead of O(n) per render frame
  when checking if hovered index is still in filtered set

Both call sites operate on filtered_indices which is produced by
enumerate().filter().map() over the items vector and is naturally
sorted, making binary_search correct without additional sorting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
